evidence.description: All REQ-FUND traceable; post-gate REQ-FUND-007b correction verified against src/commands/wallet.ts; REQ-FUND-003/017 reframed to client-enforced onQuote zero-cap.
Non-zero quote aborts pre-signature with graceful degrade; zero/null quote proceeds; regression guard prevents future auto-mint-on-failure reintroduction; Solana Base-only path tested.
Real Coinbase Onramp URL minted in throwaway HOME (HTTP 302), zero cli-budget.json writes across all deposit calls; Solana deposit correctly yields no url + Base-only note.
deposit branch reaches all I/O via existing shell functions (payOnce/openUrl); zero direct fs/fetch/child_process imports in command layer; pure zod addition for --open.

semgrep: 1 pre-existing false positive only; openUrl double-guarded (pay.coinbase.com prefix check pre-call + argv-array spawn, no shell:true); onQuote precedes createPaymentPayload architecture-wide; secrets sweep clean.
